fields.field_a: Stochastic thermodynamics — TUR, entropy production bounds
fields.field_c: Bacterial cell biology — cell size homeostasis via adder model

hypotheses.title: Multi-Current TUR Decomposition — Noise Portfolio with DnaA as Sole Near-Optimal Subsystem
key_attacks: Counter-evidence: Genthon 2026 (arxiv:2601.05193) shows extrinsic noise dominates cell size variability — intrinsic noise decomposition may be practically irrelevant
Mechanism: Independent-subsystem assumption questionable (DnaA-FtsZ STRING 0.920 coupling)
Groundedness: Dechant & Sasa 2018 confirmed but multi-current biological decomposition is PARAMETRIC extension
In vivo FtsZ GTPase rate (2.8-4.2/min) lower than cited in vitro rate (5-8/min)
hypotheses.survival_note: Framework conceptually valid and novel but extrinsic noise dominance severely limits practical relevance

hypotheses.title: ppGpp → Supercoiling → N_eff Reduction as Stress-Responsive TUR Tuning
key_attacks: Mechanism: Cooperative DnaA filament assembly means I/tau-sites filled by recruitment from R-boxes, not independently — N_eff may be less supercoiling-sensitive than independent-site model predicts
Counter-evidence: Novobiocin also inhibits DARS2 function in vivo, confounding the 'clean' supercoiling test
Quantitative: 50-75% reduction in I/tau/C-site occupancy is purely parametric with no experimental anchor
hypotheses.survival_note: ppGpp → supercoiling → initiation inhibition chain verified; TUR-N_eff connection novel but cooperative binding model challenges quantitative predictions

hypotheses.title: Incomplete RIDA Reset Creates Inter-Generational Memory Shifting Adder Toward Timer
key_attacks: LOGIC KILL: Model predicts negligible WT memory (f=0.007, rho=0.005) but claims to explain Susman 2025 PNAS 'substantial nonlinear memory' in WT E. coli — quantitative inconsistency
Counter-evidence: Lobner-Olesen 2024 PNAS shows Delta4 strain without RIDA/Hda/datA/DARS1/DARS2 grows normally at slow growth — RIDA is DISPENSABLE
Mechanism: Multiple redundant reset mechanisms (intrinsic ATPase, datA-DDAH) ignored by single-pathway model
Triviality: incomplete reset creating memory is obvious to stochastic process theorists
hypotheses.survival_note: KILLED — internal logical inconsistency between negligible WT prediction and claimed explanation of Susman 2025 data

hypotheses.title: Per-Origin Noise Spectroscopy — CL/PG Gradient Creates CV Asymmetry
key_attacks: MECHANISM KILL: DnaA diffusion (~1-5 um2/s) homogenizes any spatial gradient within ~1 second, while counting takes minutes. Peclet number ~0.002 means gradient physically CANNOT persist
CL only ~5% of total phospholipid — even with 2-3x polar enrichment, effect on DnaA-ATP regeneration is modest
Hypothesis itself identifies this as fatal flaw but dismisses it as a 'possibility' when it is a near-certainty
hypotheses.survival_note: KILLED — spatial DnaA-ATP gradient cannot exist given measured protein diffusion rates and E. coli cell dimensions

hypotheses.title: FtsZ GTPase ~2000x Over-Dissipating vs DnaA — Precision Bottleneck at Initiation Not Division
key_attacks: Triviality risk: qualitative conclusion (initiation is bottleneck) may be expected by field experts
Extrinsic noise (Genthon 2026) may render entire intrinsic comparison practically irrelevant
FtsZ84 pleiotropic effects at semi-permissive temperature could confound clean comparison
hypotheses.survival_note: Robust calculation (410-1840x ratio across all parameter ranges), well-grounded parameters, clean falsification test. Triviality is main risk.
hypotheses.strongest_kill_argument: Triviality + extrinsic noise dominance: a 2000x calculation to prove something expected, in an intrinsic noise regime that may not matter

hypotheses.title: TUR Dominates Berg-Purcell for DnaA-oriC — Bottleneck Is Thermodynamic Not Diffusive
key_attacks: Claim verification: DnaA(L366K) CANNOT initiate replication — primary experimental test is impossible as designed
Counter-evidence: Effective DnaA D could be 0.1-0.5 um2/s (membrane binding, datA sequestration) → BPL floor approaches TUR floor
Mechanism: Independence assumption for combining TUR and BPL needs theoretical justification
Saxena et al. 2013 confirmed but reveals mutant is replication-incompetent
hypotheses.survival_note: Theoretical comparison valid and novel but primary experiment flawed and effective D_DnaA unknown

hypotheses.title: Antibiotic-Specific Noise Fingerprinting at Matched Growth Rate
key_attacks: Counter-evidence: Sub-MIC ciprofloxacin induces ~25-fold SulA increase via SOS — CV increase may be entirely SOS-mediated
Mechanism: SOS regulon has >40 genes; deltaSulA control insufficient to isolate supercoiling effect
Counter-evidence: Chloramphenicol may affect supercoiling via transcription-translation coupling, undermining 'no effect' control
Dose-response slope could mimic N_eff prediction via dose-dependent SOS intensity
hypotheses.survival_note: Creative concept but antibiotic pleiotropy makes clean attribution nearly impossible; genetic perturbations would be better

key_counter_evidence: Genthon 2026 (arxiv:2601.05193): extrinsic noise dominates cell size variability in bacteria
Lobner-Olesen 2024 PNAS: RIDA/Hda dispensable for E. coli cell-cycle control
Cooperative DnaA filament assembly (Grimwade et al. 2007; Rozgaja et al. 2011): low-affinity sites require recruitment from high-affinity anchors
DnaA(L366K) replication-incompetent (Saxena et al. 2013): primary test for C2-H6 flawed
Sub-MIC ciprofloxacin induces ~25-fold SOS response: confounds C2-H7

critic_questions.question: How does extrinsic noise dominance (Genthon 2026) affect the multi-current TUR decomposition? Can intrinsic noise fraction be isolated experimentally?
How does cooperative DnaA filament assembly (low-affinity sites filled by recruitment from R-box anchors) change the N_eff vs supercoiling prediction?
Can noise fingerprinting use genetic perturbations (inducible gyrase mutants, DnaA overexpression) instead of pleiotropic antibiotics?

meta_critique.kill_rate_assessment: Slightly below 30% minimum but defensible — cycle 2 hypotheses are refined and addressed prior kill patterns
meta_critique.web_searches_per_hypothesis: All 7 hypotheses searched for novelty, counter-evidence, and claim-level verification
meta_critique.protein_property_error_detail: DnaA(L366K) described as increasing cytoplasmic D but actually prevents productive pre-RC assembly — experimental design flaw in C2-H6
meta_critique.strongest_kill_argument_for_survivor: C2-H5: Triviality (initiation bottleneck may be obvious) + extrinsic noise renders intrinsic comparison irrelevant
